name: teach-operator
description: ADHD Copilot is a Codex plugin for people suspicious or newly diagnosed with ADHD, founders, and high-agency builders who want to understand how their brain can work with AI.

interface.shortDescription: A local-first personal control plane for ADHD-aware AI focus systems.
interface.longDescription: ADHD Copilot helps people who suspect or were diagnosed late with ADHD, plus founders and high-agency builders, set up a personal AI control plane. It uses bounded context and Codex workflows to turn goals, bottlenecks, devices, calendar, tasks, and open loops into a focus system the user can inspect, approve, and repair.
defaultPrompt: Use ADHD Copilot. Launch the control-plane console and act as the apprentice on my intents.
Use ADHD Copilot to organize my calendar and set my goal as a calendar event, drafts first.
Use ADHD Copilot to triage my open loops into do now, schedule, delegate, or park.
Use ADHD Copilot to create today's focus brief from bounded calendar, email, docs, and thread context.
Use ADHD Copilot to diagnose where my focus system broke and propose one repair.
